Package com.airtribe.meditrack.util

Class DateUtil

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.util.DateUtil
public class DateUtil extends Object
Utility class for date and time operations.

      public static boolean isFutureDate(LocalDate date)
      Check if a date is in the future.

      date - the date to check
      Returns:
      true if date is in future, false otherwise

    • isFutureDateTime

      public static boolean isFutureDateTime(LocalDateTime dateTime)
      Check if a date-time is in the future.
      Parameters:
      dateTime - the date-time to check
      Returns:
      true if date-time is in future, false otherwise

      Get days between two dates.

      startDate - the start date
      endDate - the end date
      Returns:
      number of days between dates
